pass.name: Joe Pass
pass.description: Bebop voice-leading. Always ii before V. Full cadential resolution. Drop 2/3 rootless voicings.
rules: Always include ii chord before V
Use tritone sub (bII7) for V7 on repeat
Always fully cadential — no unresolved suspended dominants

wonder.name: Stevie Wonder
wonder.description: Modal (Dorian/Mixolydian). Chromatic passing 9th chords. IV→IVm borrowed chord. V9sus4 replaces bare V7.
rules: Replace V7 with V9sus4 — never bare dominant 7th in cadence
Insert bVII major as passing chord from IV to I
On chorus/bridge, substitute VIm with VI major (parallel major borrow)

dangelo.name: D'Angelo
dangelo.description: Neo-soul. 2–3 chord cyclic loops, no functional resolution. m9 as default minor. 13sus4 or 7#9 as dominant.
rules: Default minor chord: m9 with #9 color available
If progression repeats more than 4 bars, it's correct

thomas.name: Leon Thomas
thomas.description: Contemporary R&B. Four-chord functional loop. m9 minor, maj7/maj9 major, 13sus4 dominant resolves conventionally.
rules: im7 → IVm7 → bVImaj7 → V7 or V13sus4 (four-chord functional loop)
